# Riverlane's QEC technology roadmap to utility scale quantum computing
Our roadmap demonstrates how our QEC technology can accelerate the arrival of utility-scale quantum computing by 3-5 years.
It defines the engineering and scientific milestones to overcome the field’s central challenge: correcting billions of unavoidable data errors in real time.
![](https://www.riverlane.com/media/tvbnjwxc/rl_product-roadmap_mar_2026-for-web-crop.png)
← Drag to view more →
[ Download image ](https://www.riverlane.com/media/tvbnjwxc/rl_product-roadmap_mar_2026-for-web-crop.png)
webinar
## Riverlane's QEC technology roadmap webinar
Neil Gillespie, VP of Applied Research at Riverlane, provides a deep dive into each technical milestone of Riverlane's roadmap, explaining why we expect this approach to accelerate the arrival of utility‑scale quantum computing by 3–5 years. 
The presentation is followed by a Q&A and two panel discussions: **'The Quantum Computing Stack: On the Path to Utility Scale',** featuring guest panellists from across the quantum industry including: 
**Part 1: Technical challenges and milestones**
**Tobias Thiele** , Zurich Instruments, **Frank Deppe** , IQM, **Ben Yuen** , Infleqtion
**Part 2: Quantum, AI and HPC**
**Krysta Svore** , NVIDIA, **Masoud Mohseni** , Hewlett Packard Enterprises
[ ![Quantum Error Correction: Top insights from Riverlane’s Technology Roadmap webinar ](https://www.riverlane.com/media/3maaenfb/webinar-youtube-thumbnail.png?rmode=max&width=800&quality=80&v=1dcdd49be0b3970) ](https://www.riverlane.com/blog/quantum-error-correction-top-insights-from-riverlane-s-technology-roadmap-webinar)
Blog
## Quantum Error Correction: Top insights from Riverlane’s Technology Roadmap webinar 
07 May 2026
Led by Neil Gillespie, our VP of Applied Research, the session explored how a staged engineering path focused on error correction can accelerate the arrival of utility-scale quantum computing by an estimated three to five years. 
[Read more](https://www.riverlane.com/blog/quantum-error-correction-top-insights-from-riverlane-s-technology-roadmap-webinar "Quantum Error Correction: Top insights from Riverlane’s Technology Roadmap webinar ")
Roadmap whitepaper
![Roadmap whitepaper](https://www.riverlane.com/media/vtbj4mbm/roadmap-whitepaper-web-asset.png?rmode=max&width=800&quality=80&v=1dcb172106fe930)
This whitepaper outlines the Riverlane QEC Technology Roadmap, charting a detailed, phased path from foundational quantum memory experiments to fully universal, utility-scale quantum computation by 2033+. 
Discover how Riverlane will continuously advance QEC science and engineering to deliver comparable performance gains across all major qubit platforms.
[Download the whitepaper](https://www.riverlane.com/qec-technology-roadmap#roadmap_whitepaper)
[](https://www.riverlane.com/qec-technology-roadmap)
